subject: fix(audit): implement codebase audit fixes across 14 files
body:
Error handling, dead code removal, and code quality improvements found
during full codebase audit. All changes address specific issues: missing
await/try-catch on async ops, inline styles violating CSS rules, magic
numbers, Date.parse false positives, DOM injection in bootstrap, and
duplicate UI text.

Tags: audit, cleanup, error-handling, code-quality
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: codebase-audit
Semver: patch
